result.stdout:
USAGE: my-calendar [--help] [show] [<subcommand> [<options>]]

SUBCOMMANDS:

    todo <options>        allow to perform operations on your ToDos
    event <options>       allow to perform operations on your Events
    recurring-event <options>
                          allow to perform operations on your RecurringEvents

    Use 'my-calendar <subcommand> --help' for additional information.

OPTIONS:

    show                  show the main view of your calendar
    --help                display this list of options.

commands.payload:

SUBCOMMANDS:

    todo <options>        allow to perform operations on your ToDos
    event <options>       allow to perform operations on your Events
    recurring-event <options>
                          allow to perform operations on your RecurringEvents

    Use 'my-calendar <subcommand> --help' for additional information.

OPTIONS:

    show                  show the main view of your calendar
    --help                display this list of options.

result.stdout:
USAGE: my-calendar event [--help] [add] [edit] [delete]

OPTIONS:

    add                   add an Event to your list
    edit                  edit an Event from your list
    delete                remove an Event from your list
    --help                display this list of options.

USAGE: my-calendar recurring-event [--help] [add] [edit] [delete]

OPTIONS:

    add                   add a RecurringEvent to your list
    edit                  edit a RecurringEvent from your list
    delete                remove a RecurringEvent from your list
    --help                display this list of options.

result.stdout:
USAGE: my-calendar todo [--help] [add] [edit] [done] [undone] [delete]

OPTIONS:

    add                   add a ToDo to your list
    edit                  edit a ToDo from your list
    done                  mark done a ToDo
    undone                undone a ToDo marked done
    delete                remove a ToDo from your list
    --help                display this list of options.
